testcase.name: test_api_error
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_api_client.DecodedPayloads testMethod=test_api_error>
def test_api_error(self): client = self.get_client_with_body_from_file('tests/resources/models/apiException.json', 'POST', 'https://local-testing-base-url/inApps/v1/notifications/test', {}, None, 500) try: > client.request_test_notification()
tests/test_api_client.py:380: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ appstoreserverlibrary/api_client.py:711: in request_test_notification return self._make_request("/inApps/v1/notifications/test", "POST", {}, None, SendTestNotificationResponse) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ appstoreserverlibrary/api_client.py:535: in _make_request response = self._execute_request(method, url, queryParameters, headers, json) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
method = 'POST' url = 'https://local-testing-base-url/inApps/v1/notifications/test', params = {} headers = {'Accept': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6ImtleUlkIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0.eyJiaW...wFgIq6Hg0pfC3xM-SBW9TF59sESQFCxADrF_LHwzuv2Bk-cx6Xjq5BveBGnCPA', 'User-Agent': 'app-store-server-library/python/1.5.0'} json = None
def fake_execute_and_validate_inputs(method: str, url: str, params: Dict[str, Union[str, List[str]]], headers: Dict[str, str], json: Dict[str, Any]): self.assertEqual(expected_method, method) self.assertEqual(expected_url, url) self.assertEqual(expected_params, params) self.assertEqual(['User-Agent', 'Authorization', 'Accept'], list(headers.keys())) self.assertEqual('application/json', headers['Accept']) self.assertTrue(headers['User-Agent'].startswith('app-store-server-library/python')) self.assertTrue(headers['Authorization'].startswith('Bearer ')) decoded_jwt = decode_json_from_signed_date(headers['Authorization'][7:]) self.assertEqual('appstoreconnect-v1', decoded_jwt['payload']['aud']) self.assertEqual('issuerId', decoded_jwt['payload']['iss']) self.assertEqual('keyId', decoded_jwt['header']['kid']) self.assertEqual('com.example', decoded_jwt['payload']['bid']) self.assertEqual(expected_json, json)
# Simulate a response > response = http.request(method, url, fields=params, headers=headers, body=json.dumps(json)) ^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'dumps'
tests/test_api_client.py:524: AttributeError

extend_renewal_date_request = MassExtendRenewalDateRequest( extendByDays=45, extendReasonCode=ExtendReasonCode.CUSTOMER_SATISFACTION, requestIdentifier='fdf964a4-233b-486c-aac1-97d8d52688ac', storefrontCountryCodes=['USA', 'MEX'], productId='com.example.productId')

method = 'POST' url = 'https://local-testing-base-url/inApps/v1/subscriptions/extend/mass' params = {} headers = {'Accept': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6ImtleUlkIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0.eyJiaW...UIs6ufMYX0DVShRC3MY_wX4npX47p4Dc_eq9SlPIGY-YLWVsivFhZzUndw3F1g', 'User-Agent': 'app-store-server-library/python/1.5.0'} json = {'extendByDays': 45, 'extendReasonCode': 1, 'productId': 'com.example.productId', 'requestIdentifier': 'fdf964a4-233b-486c-aac1-97d8d52688ac', ...}

method = 'GET' url = 'https://local-testing-base-url/inApps/v1/subscriptions/extend/mass/20fba8a0-2b80-4a7d-a17f-85c1854727f8/com.example.product' params = {} headers = {'Accept': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6ImtleUlkIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0.eyJiaW...MNjyJjcOkFyoZe58TM520HNbFjRnNNZ3uX643xxjYjQB2GBOoI7TKXq4APfOtw', 'User-Agent': 'app-store-server-library/python/1.5.0'} json = None
def fake_execute_and_validate_inputs(method: str, url: str, params: Dict[str, Union[str, List[str]]], headers: Dict[str, str], json: Dict[str, Any]): self.assertEqual(expected_method, method) self.assertEqual(expected_url, url) self.assertEqual(expected_params, params) self.assertEqual(['User-Agent', 'Authorization', 'Accept'], list(headers.keys())) self.assertEqual('application/json', headers['Accept']) self.assertTrue(headers['User-Agent'].startswith('app-store-server-library/python')) self.assertTrue(headers['Authorization'].startswith('Bearer ')) decoded_jwt = decode_json_from_signed_date(headers['Authorization'][7:]) self.assertEqual('appstoreconnect-v1', decoded_jwt['payload']['aud']) self.assertEqual('issuerId', decoded_jwt['payload']['iss']) self.assertEqual('keyId', decoded_jwt['header']['kid']) self.assertEqual('com.example', decoded_jwt['payload']['bid']) self.assertEqual(expected_json, json)
# Simulate a response > response = http.request(method, url, fields=params, headers=headers, body=json.dumps(json)) ^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'dumps'
tests/test_api_client.py:524: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_send_consumption_data
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_api_client.DecodedPayloads testMethod=test_send_consumption_data>
def test_send_consumption_data(self): client = self.get_client_with_body(b'', 'PUT', 'https://local-testing-base-url/inApps/v1/transactions/consumption/49571273', {}, {'customerConsented': True, 'consumptionStatus': 1, 'platform': 2, 'sampleContentProvided': False, 'deliveryStatus': 3, 'appAccountToken': '7389a31a-fb6d-4569-a2a6-db7d85d84813', 'accountTenure': 4, 'playTime': 5, 'lifetimeDollarsRefunded': 6, 'lifetimeDollarsPurchased': 7, 'userStatus': 4, 'refundPreference': 3})
consumptionRequest = ConsumptionRequest( customerConsented=True, consumptionStatus=ConsumptionStatus.NOT_CONSUMED, platform=Platform.NON_APPLE, sampleContentProvided=False, deliveryStatus=DeliveryStatus.DID_NOT_DELIVER_DUE_TO_SERVER_OUTAGE, appAccountToken='7389a31a-fb6d-4569-a2a6-db7d85d84813', accountTenure=AccountTenure.THIRTY_DAYS_TO_NINETY_DAYS, playTime=PlayTime.ONE_DAY_TO_FOUR_DAYS, lifetimeDollarsRefunded=LifetimeDollarsRefunded.ONE_THOUSAND_DOLLARS_TO_ONE_THOUSAND_NINE_HUNDRED_NINETY_NINE_DOLLARS_AND_NINETY_NINE_CENTS, lifetimeDollarsPurchased=LifetimeDollarsPurchased.TWO_THOUSAND_DOLLARS_OR_GREATER, userStatus=UserStatus.LIMITED_ACCESS, refundPreference=RefundPreference.NO_PREFERENCE )
> client.send_consumption_data('49571273', consumptionRequest)
tests/test_api_client.py:370: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ appstoreserverlibrary/api_client.py:722: in send_consumption_data self._make_request("/inApps/v1/transactions/consumption/" + transaction_id, "PUT", {}, consumption_request, None) appstoreserverlibrary/api_client.py:535: in _make_request response = self._execute_request(method, url, queryParameters, headers, json) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
method = 'PUT' url = 'https://local-testing-base-url/inApps/v1/transactions/consumption/49571273' params = {} headers = {'Accept': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6ImtleUlkIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0.eyJiaW...V-XLysEbd3aLiX6y0Dpssx70yflhOUcQ9icRujuBBw9caaT10HPiSUTF5hdIzA', 'User-Agent': 'app-store-server-library/python/1.5.0'} json = {'accountTenure': 4, 'appAccountToken': '7389a31a-fb6d-4569-a2a6-db7d85d84813', 'consumptionStatus': 1, 'customerConsented': True, ...}
def fake_execute_and_validate_inputs(method: str, url: str, params: Dict[str, Union[str, List[str]]], headers: Dict[str, str], json: Dict[str, Any]): self.assertEqual(expected_method, method) self.assertEqual(expected_url, url) self.assertEqual(expected_params, params) self.assertEqual(['User-Agent', 'Authorization', 'Accept'], list(headers.keys())) self.assertEqual('application/json', headers['Accept']) self.assertTrue(headers['User-Agent'].startswith('app-store-server-library/python')) self.assertTrue(headers['Authorization'].startswith('Bearer ')) decoded_jwt = decode_json_from_signed_date(headers['Authorization'][7:]) self.assertEqual('appstoreconnect-v1', decoded_jwt['payload']['aud']) self.assertEqual('issuerId', decoded_jwt['payload']['iss']) self.assertEqual('keyId', decoded_jwt['header']['kid']) self.assertEqual('com.example', decoded_jwt['payload']['bid']) self.assertEqual(expected_json, json)
# Simulate a response > response = http.request(method, url, fields=params, headers=headers, body=json.dumps(json)) ^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'dict' object has no attribute 'dumps'
tests/test_api_client.py:524: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_unknown_error
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_api_client.DecodedPayloads testMethod=test_unknown_error>
def test_unknown_error(self): client = self.get_client_with_body_from_file('tests/resources/models/apiUnknownError.json', 'POST', 'https://local-testing-base-url/inApps/v1/notifications/test', {}, None, 400) try: > client.request_test_notification()
tests/test_api_client.py:426: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ appstoreserverlibrary/api_client.py:711: in request_test_notification return self._make_request("/inApps/v1/notifications/test", "POST", {}, None, SendTestNotificationResponse) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ appstoreserverlibrary/api_client.py:535: in _make_request response = self._execute_request(method, url, queryParameters, headers, json) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
method = 'POST' url = 'https://local-testing-base-url/inApps/v1/notifications/test', params = {} headers = {'Accept': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6ImtleUlkIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0.eyJiaW..._0e7WwEfxul4g4-b5AW0XYiNBAcBIZCVkcDgKByBeigKrbvwTvLvqS836YQPDw', 'User-Agent': 'app-store-server-library/python/1.5.0'} json = None
def fake_execute_and_validate_inputs(method: str, url: str, params: Dict[str, Union[str, List[str]]], headers: Dict[str, str], json: Dict[str, Any]): self.assertEqual(expected_method, method) self.assertEqual(expected_url, url) self.assertEqual(expected_params, params) self.assertEqual(['User-Agent', 'Authorization', 'Accept'], list(headers.keys())) self.assertEqual('application/json', headers['Accept']) self.assertTrue(headers['User-Agent'].startswith('app-store-server-library/python')) self.assertTrue(headers['Authorization'].startswith('Bearer ')) decoded_jwt = decode_json_from_signed_date(headers['Authorization'][7:]) self.assertEqual('appstoreconnect-v1', decoded_jwt['payload']['aud']) self.assertEqual('issuerId', decoded_jwt['payload']['iss']) self.assertEqual('keyId', decoded_jwt['header']['kid']) self.assertEqual('com.example', decoded_jwt['payload']['bid']) self.assertEqual(expected_json, json)
# Simulate a response > response = http.request(method, url, fields=params, headers=headers, body=json.dumps(json)) ^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'dumps'
tests/test_api_client.py:524: AttributeError
